message.content: Plot the last 30 days of API p95 latency from Grafana and cross-reference the May incident notes.

content.thinking: The user wants a 30-day Grafana p95 panel plus a correlation pass against the May incident notes. I'll pull the panel via the Grafana MCP server first, then read docs/incidents/2026-05.md so I can call out matching spikes.
